summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Staff Attendance + Salary Management App. Both backend and frontend are fully functional. The main agent's concern about blank main content area has been resolved - all pages load correctly with proper content.
passed_tests: Staff CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
Attendance marking and retrieval by date/month
Staff page with empty state and table view
Add Staff modal with form validation
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Staff, Attendance, Salary)
